rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHARLES YOUNG CHONG et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof (By Trustee Aaron Chong)
rulings.Rulings: Aaron Chong's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is granted with leave to amend. Alvin Chong has 30 days to file an amended petition to allege additional facts in support of the causes of action in the current petition. This does not include any partition or elder abuse claims for which leave must be sought. The prevailing party shall prepare the order. Should either side wish to argue the tentative ruling, please contact the court and opposing counsel no later than July 2, 2014, at 3:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FREDERICK MAISEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Dismiss Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property To Trust (Probate Code 850(A)(1)D)), For Double Damages (Probate Code 859); And For Damages For Financial Elder Abuse And Legal Malpractice; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Argument is needed in this case. Please come at 3:00 p.m. Please call the court at 2:00 p.m. to confirm in case the mental health calendar at SFGH runs longer than expected. The parties shall address whether the gist of the action is legal and requires resolution of factual issues by a jury or whether the gist of the action is probate -- with the remaining two causes of action ancillary to what is in dispute.
